inputs.label: Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the substance to be vaporized.

inputs.label: Initial Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Starting temperature of the liquid before heating.

inputs.label: Boiling Point
inputs.businessContext: Boiling point of the liquid at the given pressure.

inputs.label: Specific Heat Capacity
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat capacity of the liquid phase (constant pressure).

inputs.label: Latent Heat of Vaporization
inputs.businessContext: Energy required to vaporize one kilogram of the liquid at boiling point.

inputs.label: Heating Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the heating system (100% means no losses).

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to account for design margins or uncertainties.
